ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "year" TEXT /* The year of the recorded data */,
  "month" TEXT /* The month of the recorded data */,
  "region" TEXT /* The geographical region of the recorded data */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The specific sector of the recorded data */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* The type of energy source */,
  "power_utility" REAL /* Energy consumed from utility sources (in MWh) */,
  "power_captive" REAL /* Energy consumed from captive power sources (in MWh) */,
  "cement" REAL /* Energy consumed by cement manufacturing (in MWh) */,
  "other" REAL /* Energy consumed by other sources (in MWh) */,
  "total" REAL /* Total energy consumption (in MWh) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "month", "region", "sector", "source_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production" (
  "year" TEXT /* The year of the recorded production data */,
  "month" TEXT /* The month of the recorded production data */,
  "region" TEXT /* The geographical region of the recorded production data */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The specific sector of the recorded production data */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* The type of energy source */,
  "production_utility" REAL /* Energy produced by utility sources (in MWh) */,
  "production_captive" REAL /* Energy produced by captive power sources (in MWh) */,
  "production_cement" REAL /* Energy produced by cement manufacturing (in MWh) */,
  "production_other" REAL /* Energy produced by other sources (in MWh) */,
  "production_total" REAL /* Total energy production (in MWh) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "month", "region", "sector", "source_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_analysis" (
  "year" TEXT /* The year of the recorded analysis */,
  "month" TEXT /* The month of the recorded analysis */,
  "region" TEXT /* The geographical region of the analysis */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The specific sector of the analysis */,
  "consumption_trend" TEXT /* Trend description for energy consumption (e.g., increase, decrease, stable) */,
  "production_trend" TEXT /* Trend description for energy production (e.g., increase, decrease, stable) */,
  "efficiency_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of total energy production to total energy consumption */,
  "forecasted_consumption" REAL /* Forecasted energy consumption (in MWh) */,
  "forecasted_production" REAL /* Forecasted energy production (in MWh) */,
  "economic_growth_rate" REAL /* Economic growth rate */,
  "technological_advancement_score" REAL /* Technological advancement score */,
  "regulatory_change_impact" TEXT /* Impact of regulatory changes on energy consumption and production */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "month", "region", "sector")
)
column_names: The year of the recorded data
